---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or component
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Component Type (if applicable)**
Check all that apply:
- [ ] New component type
- [ ] Chart/visualization
- [ ] Text formatting
- [ ] Theme/styling feature
- [ ] API enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example/demo
- [ ] Performance improvement

**Use Case**
Describe the real-world use case for this feature. What kind of reports would benefit?

**Inspired by (optional)**
If this feature is inspired by other reporting tools (JasperReports, BIRT, Pentaho, Crystal Reports, etc.), please provide links to documentation or examples.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
